instructionalDaysDescription: The official 2027-2028 Spotsylvania instructional calendar lists 178 student days.
seoTitle: Spotsylvania County Public Schools Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 26 last day, holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts the 2027-2028 school year with transition day on August 10, followed by the first day of school on August 11. Fall Break runs November 24-26, Winter Break runs December 20-31, Spring Break runs March 13-17, and the last day of school is May 26, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Spotsylvania County start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts school on Wednesday, August 11, 2027. The calendar also lists transition day on Tuesday, August 10.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spotsylvania County Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the 2027-2028 SCPS calendar runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Spotsylvania County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 20 through Friday, December 31, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Spotsylvania County in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 26, 2028, and it is listed as an early release day.

yearNumbers.label: Student Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists 178 student days for 2027-2028.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs earlier in March than the prior school year.

yearNumbers.label: Early Release Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists early release/last day on May 26.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: Spring Break moves from March 22-26 in 2027 to March 13-17 in 2028.
The last day moves from May 28 in 2027 to May 26 in 2028.
